rulings.Case Title: RONALD PALMER VS. AC AND S INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Friction Materials Corp. Of L.A.'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Friction Materials Corp. of Los Angeles¿ motion for summary judgment is granted. FMCLA satisfied its burden of production with factually devoid interrogatory responses regarding any asbestos-containing product attributable to FMCLA. Plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue regarding any asbestos-containing product attributable to FMCLA. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH ELLINGSEN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Intervene
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, January 26, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. UNITED STATES FIDELITY AND GUARANTY COMPANY's MOTION For Leave To Intervene is granted. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)
